top_signals.title: China-linked JDY botnet expands targeting of U.S. military networks
top_signals.summary: The JDY botnet, a malware network previously associated with Chinese threat actors like Volt Typhoon, has significantly expanded its targeting scope and reconnaissance efforts. [...]

top_signals.title: Volvo Trucks unattended over-the-air updates launching later this year
top_signals.summary:
Volvo Trucks will launch unattended over-the-air software updates later this year, allowing fleets to update parked trucks while drivers are away.

top_signals.title: Onchain gambling keeps rolling with $14B quarter despite crypto slump: TRM Labs
top_signals.summary: TRM Labs said onchain gambling reached $51 billion in 2025, with repeat users and stablecoin flows helping the sector remain resilient during a broader crypto market pullback.

top_signals.summary: Japan enters the 2026 football World Cup as Asia’s top-ranked team, fueling hopes that the Samurai Blue can finally reach the quarterfinals and lift shares of streaming, food and beverage companies along the way.

top_signals.summary: London's Underground fare zone system may constitute unlawful indirect discrimination against BAME commuters, according to a new study by Fideres Partners.

top_signals.summary: Baghdadi Capital, a global independent family office specialising in corporate and investment banking, announces the integration of Qasioun Partners, a new firm specialising in Advisory Finance and Investment Banking, which joins the Group with its own capital structure.
